name: Lindsey Graham
subject: Reject The Iran Deal
body:
Reject The Iran Deal | |

---
---
|
Dear Friend,

**President Obama's nuclear deal with Iran is dangerous for America and for our allies.**

This deal will not prevent Iran from becoming a nuclear threshold state. In fact, within a few short years, the Iranians will be able to obtain a nuclear weapon with no repercussions.

This deal also does not provide the anytime/anywhere inspections that the world originally demanded.

**The result of this deal: the chance of a military intervention is all the more real. That is the true disaster of this deal.**

[**If you agree with me that this deal must be rejected, I ask for you to join me in calling on Congress to REJECT THE IRAN DEAL.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29216905:28043532623:m:1:877327319:E283ABBF7BAD9611C8C6D2FC7D893869:r)

President Obama didn't put America's interests first with this agreement. Instead, he wanted a deal so badly that he conceded too much in the interest of getting a deal.

If this seems crazy to you, Friend, it is. Iran, who has been our enemy and is the world's largest state sponsor of terrorism, is now positioned to receive over a hundred billion dollars from accounts currently frozen. Even worse, we are lifting the embargo that prevents Iran from getting conventional weapons.

**The deal will lead to a nuclear arms race in the Middle East and threatens the very existence of our close ally, Israel.**

_**We must not allow that to happen.**_ I will fight with all means necessary to stop this dangerous deal with Iran. It does not meet the eight principles for a good deal that I laid out earlier this year, so **I am calling on Congress to reject this bad deal.**

Yesterday, I launched the "No Nukes for Iran" tour, a nationwide effort aimed at encouraging members of Congress to vote against this bad deal. Members of Congress will vote on this deal in the next 60 days, so it is critical that the American people contact their representatives and encourage them to vote against this deal.

**When I am president, I will work to implement a good deal with Iran that prevents a nuclear breakout, ensures anytime/anywhere inspections, caps Iran's nuclear ambitions to limited power generation, and provides better stability for the region.**

[**If you agree this deal is bad, then please add your name to the #NoNukesForIran petition.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29216905:28043532623:m:1:877327319:E283ABBF7BAD9611C8C6D2FC7D893869:r)

As Benjamin Netanyahu said when this terrible deal was first announced, this is an "_**historic mistake for the world.**_ " Friend, I know that together we can reject this deal and make this an _**historic win**_ for the world.

[**Please let me know if you agree we must immediately reject this Iran deal.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29216905:28043532623:m:1:877327319:E283ABBF7BAD9611C8C6D2FC7D893869:r)

Sincerely,

Lindsey Graham

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29216905:28043532623:m:1:877327319:E283ABBF7BAD9611C8C6D2FC7D893869:r)
|

| Paid for by Lindsey Graham 2016

---

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

name: Cam Henderson
subject: time is running out...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc
body:
I'm the Finance Director for Governor Christie's presidential campaign, and I want to share with you a special opportunity to become a **Founding Digital Member** of our campaign. Since Governor Christie entered the race on June 30th, the support from people like yourself opting to be a Founding Digital Member has been overwhelming and the Governor is thrilled with the response!

However, I don't see you on the Founding Digital Member roster (your record is provided below) so I wanted to personally follow up.
**Email ID: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Founding Digital Member Status: Not Active**
**Become a Member Below:**
**[Suggested Donation Amount: $30>>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43058631:18229908636:m:1:1516426255:779FA13D0E4C33330CE837A4427D0587:r)**
****
****
Our Founding Digital Members are our earliest supporters who have made a financial commitment within the first 30 days of Governor Christie's presidential campaign. This special group receives member-only benefits, including:
> * Team conference calls
> * Email updates from campaign leadership
> * **SPECIAL:** if you donate before the deadline, you will also receive an official Chris Christie presidential campaign bumper sticker.
>

The deadline to become a Founding Digital Member ends on July 30th and, with time running out, **[I urge you to act now](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43058632:18229908636:m:1:1516426255:779FA13D0E4C33330CE837A4427D0587:r)**.

Sincerely,

Cam Henderson
Finance Director
Chris Christie 2016
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/43058632:18229908636:m:1:1516426255:779FA13D0E4C33330CE837A4427D0587:r)

name: Ben Carson
subject: This demands your attention
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| Peter,

When I saw the video last week of a top Planned Parenthood official discussing the sale of aborted baby parts, I was so enraged that I started a petition calling on Congress to cut off all of their taxpayer funding.

**In just one week, it's now been signed by over 200,000 people across America.**

Now there's a second video. This time, it's of a Planned Parenthood official joking around about her need to make enough money from the sale of aborted baby parts to buy a Lamborghini.

Peter, it's time to double our efforts and I need your help.

**[If you believe Congress should hold real hearings to expose Planned Parenthood's barbaric practices and immediately cut off all public funds, sign my petition now](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29232205:28047392557:m:1:876315805:244B303002C8EA0B00E4E251E72C55E1:r). We'll even send you ****a 'Stop Planned Parenthood' bumper sticker to help spread the word.** | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29232205:28047392557:m:1:876315805:244B303002C8EA0B00E4E251E72C55E1:r)
---
I said this last week and I'll say it again -- the Declaration of Independence states that we are all endowed by our Creator with certain unalienable rights.

First and foremost among these unalienable rights is life, and we created a government in order to protect it -- not fund its destruction.

**[So I ask you -- please stand with me and over 200,000 of your fellow citizens by signing my petition right now.](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29232205:28047392557:m:1:876315805:244B303002C8EA0B00E4E251E72C55E1:r)

Together, let's demand that Congress holds real hearings on the practices of Planned Parenthood, and works to immediately cut off every penny of public funding.**

Thank you for joining me in this important effort.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

| | |
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29232205:28047392557:m:1:876315805:244B303002C8EA0B00E4E251E72C55E1:r) [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29232206:28047392557:m:1:876315805:244B303002C8EA0B00E4E251E72C55E1:r)
---
|
---

---|---|---|---

Carson America, Inc | P.O. Box 26261 | Alexandria, VA 22313

name: Karen Kasich
subject: Proud!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
[

](www.JohnKasich.com)
I'm so proud that my husband is running for President of the United States. **He has the unique experience needed and the vision to fix our great nation**.

He was on the Armed Services Committee for 18 years and was able to travel all over the world working on national security issues. [He was Chairman of the House Budget Committee the last time we balanced the federal budget](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29236027:28049199251:m:1:958431888:5FE68AFE36263AB761E8E80397F205B5:r). And, as Governor of Ohio he has helped to cut taxes and create 350,000 jobs!

Ohioans rewarded him in a landslide election.

Most important, he is a wonderful husband to me and father to our twin girls, Emma and Reese.

[Can you show your support right now by chipping in $25 or more to help?](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29236028:28049199251:m:1:958431888:5FE68AFE36263AB761E8E80397F205B5:r) It would mean a lot to me!

**I'm hoping you will support John as he takes this pivotal step**. [Please join the team today](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29236029:28049199251:m:1:958431888:5FE68AFE36263AB761E8E80397F205B5:r). Get involved or chip in at: [JohnKasich.com](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29236029:28049199251:m:1:958431888:5FE68AFE36263AB761E8E80397F205B5:r)

Thank you for all of your our help.

Warmly,

Karen Kasich
First Lady of Ohio
[www.JohnKasich.com](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29236029:28049199251:m:1:958431888:5FE68AFE36263AB761E8E80397F205B5:r)

Paid for by Kasich For America, www.JohnKasich.com

name: James Carville
subject: The best dinner party of your life? This is better.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
You should not miss this. | Friend --

Do me a favor: Think about the best story you've ever heard at any dinner party you've ever been to in your life. You thinking about it? Great.

Now, think about any story you might hear at dinner with Hillary Clinton.

Eight years in the White House, 8 years in the Senate, 4 as Secretary of State? Don't tell me you're not curious.

**Sign up right now to win a free trip to have dinner with Hillary:**

**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/dinner-with-hillary/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjMxMDQzNDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAyMTQ5NzI5S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Thanks,

James Carville

P.S. Did you know you get to bring a guest if you win? For free! For both of you! **[Go on and enter this thing already!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjMxMDQzNDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAyMTQ5NzI5S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

| **No purchase, payment, or contribution is necessary to win, and will not improve chances of winning.** Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 6/26/15 and 7/30/15. Enter by contributing [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=MjMxMDQzNDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAyMTQ5NzI5S0&mt=1&rt=0) or click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjMxMDQzNDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAyMTQ5NzI5S0&mt=1&rt=0) to enter without contributing. One (1) winner and a guest will receive a special invitation to a campaign dinner event with Hillary Clinton, round-trip airline tickets from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to the location of the campaign event and one (1) night hotel accommodation (approximate retail value of Prizes: $1900). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens or residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to [Official Rules](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjMxMDQzNDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAyMTQ5NzI5S0&mt=1&rt=0) and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Hillary for America, 300 Cadman Plaza W, Brooklyn, NY 11201. | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=MjMxMDQzNDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAyMTQ5NzI5S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjMxMDQzNDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAyMTQ5NzI5S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjMxMDQzNDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAyMTQ5NzI5S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjMxMDQzNDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAyMTQ5NzI5S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjMxMDQzNDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAyMTQ5NzI5S0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjMxMDQzNDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAyMTQ5NzI5S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Team Cruz
subject: Tune in: Ted Cruz on Hannity tonight at 9 pm CT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cruz for President

| Dear Friend,

Just wanted to alert you that Ted Cruz will be on Hannity tonight on Fox News in the 9 pm CT hour. We hope you'll tune in and tell your friends to do the same!

For liberty,

Team Cruz

P.S. We also wanted to make sure you see [this new video](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=oxRiKmNZf-2B-2FjHRySYBDLy1BTGh3S2t8hxlY5K0GKyqUxtniKFDX3cLwncbdjWbr1_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCEApA91NjWgnbxergsZYXLXxKSWpq230RxCuzoL5-2FR-2Bztd30ru8hHzU70MdGoSSBu9jroEGb4WHmwGJvk40QnJobzPY2vz6RZ8SYUxg6TvKsHqYbp4JeGKhVOUiujrwr0z5vqsMO3v7oQVZEVTJypjLspfnuELdvehnyda-2FmWmlCkuYLmGonMBRFand-2FPfdi0QXV5s3nW4r6WeA8XpTaynJgQeOFY-2Bm2SdwP9WQRDB9g5TGzCOyRTwIfB-2FYPEppDeIL3AftjcQNptBFZROEISWQOT-2BthfOogJN3X2Q38siCdqpXEcHSOW6N1K3YXMuqOnQ6pYOsasH8SNLELL8Puornx8Ue2DsZakW0xoiHLqrs56IOf2BOcP50Wo2bH3FsRFQ-3D) from the campaign discussing our first freedom, religious liberty, and that you know about our [Rally for Religious Liberty on August 21st](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=oxRiKmNZf-2B-2FjHRySYBDLy09v5edMMZm9mVbjZI6SnjxpComyEnH7uoVag5waV1UD_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCEApA91NjWgnbxergsZYXLXq-2BArgvUdiEjzenLGbhASS-2Bfvc4G2WMLDS3KN1yeqVYzfFowXp1WIDjSKhoudO4ncSluQqNsKRtEZHTrzhHOTYC5qIqIRFBxaViamX1WaUcEsRZ7Wu1XfALMekHSj0BmYrKCrHmm-2FGf-2FaV3s1O8BaG-2FutFWhKuZ3ADUYlkwQKBXhd20m-2FW4g-2FarcNplQLEC3Wf8znuR6zCeqm7GZ-2FORsMtiRt2JBorVgoVyXzR2gqqmJqTnvqd7jPUUJOl9PsF9EIyy-2B4-2BpEb3TX5BZk-2FyXpxzbWmDwB-2BuFOmtveVaZc1kk7BgchV2BIQILtvbSXa2BhKwsvIUQbRcX6IhpgwoM9LUKR1MEkMdfM0iWVZIrjny5M-3D). name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Affordable + accessible birth control
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| I'm sponsoring the _Affordability is Access Act_ in the House. Show your support today. Friend -- Have you heard? Recent analysis shows that the _Affordable Care Act_ has saved American women over $1 billion on birth control. This is great to see -- but we can do even better. Here's how: If and when the F.D.A. approves birth control for over-the-counter use, let's make sure it'll be covered by insurance. Sound like a radical idea? It's not. Women deserve equal access to comprehensive health care -- and that includes contraception. Birth control can be expensive, potentially costing a woman hundreds of dollars a year, and politicians should not put roadblocks between her and affordable birth control. I am sponsoring the _Affordability is Access Act_ in the House, which makes sure that the _Affordable Care Act_ 's contraception mandate would apply to over-the-counter birth control -- providing both affordability and access for women. I'm joining Senator Murray and several other members of Congress to build support for this commonsense bill. We need you -- and Americans across the country -- to join us. [**Will you add your name as a citizen co-sponsor of the _Affordability is Access Act_ today?**](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae201b/738133e4/393da34a/7f90851e/3327338479/VEsH/ "http://www.affordabilityisaccess.com/?sc=murphy.otc") Like I said: It's not a radical idea. It's smart. It'll save money for Florida's women. And it'll expand access to affordable health care. That's something I can get behind. [**Do you agree? Add your name today.**](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae201b/738133e4/393da34a/7f90851e/3327338479/VEsE/ "http://www.affordabilityisaccess.com/?sc=murphy.otc") Thanks, Patrick Murphy | **[TAKE ACTION »](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae201b/738133e4/393da34a/7f90851e/3327338479/VEsF/ "http://www.affordabilityisaccess.com/?sc=murphy.otc")**
---

| | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae201b/738133e4/393da34a/7f90851f/3327338479/VEsC/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae201b/738133e4/393da34a/7f908518/3327338479/VEsD/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/unsubscribe").

Contributions or gifts to Friends of Patrick Murphy are not tax deductible.

name: take.action@vanhollen.org
subject: it started with Elizabeth Warren
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Friend,

Here's what Sen. Elizabeth Warren showed all of us back in 2012 when she pioneered a pledge that banned secret money from her U.S. Senate race: **e _**l** ections are about people_**. She showed us how candidates for the Senate can lead by example and work together to prevent the flood of money from billionaires, SuperPACs and other outside organizations who spend whatever they want in the wake of Citizens United.

Ever since the terrible decision in Citizens United, Chris has led the fight to pass the DISCLOSE Act in order to end the flow of secret money. While Republicans in Congress have blocked that legislation, Sen. Warren showed they can't stop candidates who are willing to lead by example in their own campaigns.

That's why last week, Chris offered his historic "Free State Pledge" so Maryland can build upon the example that Elizabeth Warren started in Massachusetts.

**But Chris 's opponent has so far refused to sign the pledge.** That's why we need your voice today to send a message that this election is about the people of Maryland, not the SuperPACs. **Supporter Record: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Free State Pledge Citizen Co-Sponsor Status: NOT SIGNED
[SIGN NOW>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ea2/70cdc2ba/4795f120/394cd21/3109053324/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTA2In0=/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/ocs/become-a-citizen-co-sponsor-of-the-free-state-pledge-/wtt?source=em072215&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20906&auto=1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+SIGN+NOWgtgt&utm_campaign=em072215")** [](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ea2/70cdc2ba/4795f120/394cd34/3109053324/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTA2In0=/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/ocs/become-a-citizen-co-sponsor-of-the-free-state-pledge-/wtt?source=em072215&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20906&auto=1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=em072215") Chris has always believed that our democracy should never be for sale to the highest bidder, and when Nancy Pelosi and President Obama needed a champion in Congress to lead the fight against Citizens United, they called on Chris Van Hollen.

And now in this U.S. Senate election, it's up to us to show Chris we're standing with him.

**[Fight back against the corrosive influence of Citizens United. Sign on as a CITIZEN CO-SPONSOR of Chris' Free State Pledge: Click here to add your name automatically.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ea2/70cdc2ba/4795f120/394cdcd/3109053324/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTA2In0=/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/ocs/become-a-citizen-co-sponsor-of-the-free-state-pledge-/wtt?source=em072215&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20906&auto=1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Fight+back+against+the+corrosive+influen&utm_campaign=em072215")**

This is too important,

Team Van Hollen

| Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ea2/70cdc2ba/4795f120/394cdc9/3109053324/VEsC/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em072215&source=em072215") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages, please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

name: Rand Paul
subject: Lives for Lamborghinis?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

During my 17 years as a practicing physician, I treated premature babies almost every week.

I've cradled their small, precious bodies in the palm of one hand and looked into their eyes as they struggled to survive. Many of them weighed under two pounds.

So Fellow Conservative, I'm not going to mince words. The thought of Planned Parenthood officials killing these babies, dismembering them and selling their body parts for profit sickens my stomach.

And I vow to do everything I can to stop it. That's why I just introduced an Amendment to H.R. 22 (the vehicle for the highway bill) to Defund Planned Parenthood.

**[Can I count on you to help me force my colleagues in Congress to stand in front of the American people and declare where they stand by signing your "Defund Planned Parenthood" Petition immediately](http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-79295-170002-1634151-7da0446758-ca63f8527f)**?

Fellow Conservative, the latest undercover video shows Planned Parenthood officials squabbling over the price of aborted baby parts because one official joked she wanted to buy a Lamborghini.

And to add insult to injury, hard-working taxpayers are being forced to fund Planned Parenthood's killing and selling of aborted baby body parts for profit.

In fact, Planned Parenthood raked in almost $550 million in taxpayer funding in 2014 alone.

That's over half a BILLION dollars, Fellow Conservative! Ripped from the paychecks of hard-working taxpayers and sent directly to Planned Parenthood's abortion mills across the country.

I believe it's time to put the brakes on Planned Parenthood's taxpayer funded gravy train.

And since the Republican Congress controls the power of the purse, I believe this is a fight you and I can win -- even with President Obama in the White House.

**[So please sign your "Defund Planned Parenthood" Petition immediately](http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-79295-170002-1634151-7da0446758-ca63f8527f)**.

And after you sign your petition, won't you please chip in a contribution of $20.16 right away?

There's no telling when my Amendment to defund Planned Parenthood will come to the floor for a vote. It could be as early as next week.

Your generous gift will help me mobilize as many Republican voters across the country to stand with me in this fight to end taxpayer funding of abortion.

So Fellow Conservative, won't you please chip in a contribution of $20.16 right away to help defund Planned Parenthood?

It's up to you and me to ensure my colleagues in Congress take action. No one else will do it for us. The national media remains virtually silent.

But with your help, I'm confident we can force my Amendment to defund Planned Parenthood to the floor for an up or down vote.

**[So please, sign your "Stand for Life: Defund Planned Parenthood" Petition and chip in a contribution to help end taxpayer funding of abortion](http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-79295-170002-1634151-7da0446758-ca63f8527f)**.

Thank you in advance for your support.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-79295-170002-1634153-b45c727e4e-ca63f8527f)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-79295-170002-1634154-456d6c85e3-ca63f8527f)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-79295-170002-1634156-570439dbdf-ca63f8527f)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-79295-170002-1634157-3be6271155-ca63f8527f)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-79295-170002-1634151-7da0446758-ca63f8527f)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-79295-170002-1634151-7da0446758-ca63f8527f)

[](http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-79295-170002-1634158-5e1a889256-ca63f8527f) [](http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-79295-170002-1634159-8397ff0a2f-ca63f8527f) [](http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-79295-170002-1634160-d4eacd8983-ca63f8527f)
Paid for by Rand Paul for President

[Unsubscribe](http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/unsubscribe/2-119520316-1371-79295-170002-f73e30ade84114f-ca63f8527f)
